title: The Earth Prays for Krishna to Come
source_verses_or_boundary: Opening through Brahma receiving the Lord's message
original_summary_seed: Bhumi takes the form of a cow and seeks Brahma's help; at the Ocean of Milk, Brahma receives the Lord's promise within his heart.

must_avoid: direct quote promising Vrindavana birth|wedding|later events
devotional_theme: prayer and hope

title: The Wedding and the Heavenly Voice
original_summary_seed: Devaki marries Vasudeva; her brother Kamsa drives their chariot, hears the warning about her eighth child, and is calmed by Vasudeva's truthful promise.

must_avoid: first son born|Narada warning|imprisonment

title: Vasudeva Keeps His Word
original_summary_seed: Devaki's first son is born, and Vasudeva keeps his difficult promise by bringing the child to Kamsa, who is astonished and initially returns him.
